verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Sweet will of God, still fold me closer, Till I am wholly lost in Thee; Sweet will of God, still fold me closer, Till I am wholly lost in Thee.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm tired of sin, foot-sore and weary, The dark-some path hath dreary grown, But now a light has ris'n to cheer me; I find in Thee my Star, my Sun.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Thy precious will, Oh conqu'ring Saviour, Doth now embrace and compass me; All discords hushed, my peace a river, My soul a prisoned bird set free.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Shut in with Thee, Oh Lord, forever, My wayward feet no more to roam; What pow'r from Thee my soul can sever? The center of God's will my home.
